feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Service Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Service Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sales cloud version 2 - App - Offline Functionality
entry.content:
In Sales Cloud Version 1, there was an Offline Mode within the App.

Now in the New App for Sales Cloud Version 2, there seems to be no 'Offline' functionality.

Is the same offline functionality planned as part of the feature parity?

Up until now we only got the information that it is not clear if this will come or maybe be just sold for an extra Retail/App license.  So does that mean, the standard App for Version 2 is not having an offline mode anymore?

A lot of customers are still requesting this.

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud V2 - Case creation in Full screen mode
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

Is it possible to create the Case in the full screen mode? I couldn't find any setting related to it. Do we have similar behaviour as V1?

 

 #ServicecloudV2 SAP Service Cloud

entry.title: Auto Flow - scheduled feature
entry.content:
In the Version 1 there was an option to set the workflows as 'scheduled' in order to implement something like:

"Send an email to the quote owner 5 days before the Valid To date is reached"

In the Verison 2 currently within the Auto Flow there is no option for scheduled flows. When is this planned?

entry.title: Placeholders - unable to see the data related to placeholders using templates in Case
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We had a problem using Placeholders in templates in SAP Service Cloud version 2.

We want to display the name of our contact in a response template. But, when insert the template, contact's name is not display. 

Image 1. HTML code

Image 2. Template configuration in SSCV2

Image 3. Email received by account contact

Thanks! 🙂

#SAPSalesCloudVersion2 #SAPServiceCloudVersion2 #Version2

entry.title: Can we connect Service Cloud V1 and V2 to the same S4 HANA tenant. ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts. 

We want to explore Service Cloud V2 and the user story appears that it is possible to connect V1 and V2 running on the same S4 HANA tenant?

entry.title: Sales Cloud
In service cloud v2, how can we auto-escalate the cases and auto assign it to manager?
entry.content: In service cloud v2, how can we auto-escalate the cases once the SLA is breached and once the case is escalated how it can be auto-assigned to manager of the case processor? I tried it using autoflow but with autoflows I am just able to send the notification or email. How can I update the 'Assigned to' field of escalated case to the manager?

entry.title: In service cloud v2, case fields are not getting updated using patch API
entry.content: I am using https://api.sap.com/api/SalesSvcCloudV2_case/tryout PATCH api to update the field in existing case in Service Cloud v2. I am facing 412 error when I hit the patch request. I have attached screenshot below.

entry.title: TDD test tenant items purchase for sales clould and service cloud v2 provision?
entry.content:
SAP partner for sales clould and service cloud v2 , if I like to have a TDD test tenant, which of the following options for purchase is correct？
option1 8004470、8014371、8014363、8008801
option2 8014371、8014363、8008801

Products (service)
Cloud test and demo for SAP Field Service Management - (8007134)
Cloud test and demo for SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI - (8016110)
Cloud test and demo for SAP Service and Asset Manager - (8005710)
Cloud test, demo and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud - (8004470)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP - (8008816)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Application Logging service for SAP BTP, standard - (8008812)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Mobile Services - (8008809)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Portal service - (8008811)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Portal service, administrator - (8008810)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud, dynamic visit planning add-on - (8011475)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud, intelligent sales add-on - (8011476)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud, service agent console - (8011477)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Service Cloud Version 2 - (8014371)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Service Cloud Version 2, Utilities Add-On - (8014411)

Products (sales)
Cloud test, demo and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud - (8004470)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 - (8014363)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud, dynamic visit planning add-on - (8011475)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud, intelligent sales add-on - (8011476)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Sales and Service Cloud, service agent console - (8011477)

 

Products (integration suite for ERP to CRM)
Cloud test and demo for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain - (8004817)
Cloud test and demo for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain (upgrade to 512 GB) - (8005266)
Cloud test and demo for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for credit integration - (8005679)
Cloud test and demo for SAP trading platform integration - (8012353)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery - (8009362)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Data Privacy Integration - (8008950)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Data Privacy Integration, additional storage - (8008953)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Document Management, integration option - (8008804)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Integration Suite, edge integration cell, additional tenant - (8018102)
Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP Integration Suite, standard edition - (8008801)

entry.title: Additional Filters for C4C Ticket Categorization ML
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, we have a scenario on Ticket Categorization Machine Learning. In this scenario, we have 2 separate teams/org. One team (Team 1) is using cs_team1@org.com for their incoming emails to create tickets. The other team (Team 2) uses support@org2.com for their customer support tickets.

In our rule, we are routing the respective generated tickets based on the channel we have set up for those email addresses. Both teams work as customer support agents but for different subsidiary brands of the company.

The question here is how do we train the ML and ensure that the categorization assigned is meant for Team 1 vs Team 2? We have issues that the emails for Team 2 are getting routed to the queue of Team 1 because of the auto-categorization.

Note: We also have routing rules enabled for categories. The last rule is for incoming emails.

Thanks in advance!

Marc

entry.title: Is there a way to control which notifications appear for the end user in C4C
entry.content:
Is there a way to control which notifications show in the bell icon of C4C? 

For example - stop showing notifications related to appointments under bell icon.

entry.title: When will C4C v1 be sunset?
entry.content:
Hi experts

I can't find any SAP article about this question, but considering we now have C4C v2, do we also have a timeline on when C4C v1 will be sunset? And if so, do we have an easy migration tool from v1 to v2 I can read on?

Thanks

entry.title: Lead Management: Create Lead only with contact and without "Existing Account" or "Company"
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have a requirement to create Leads without an existing Account/Company, but it seems this is not possible.

While it's possible to create Opportunities using just a Contact, the Account is mandatory for Leads and cannot be unchecked in FineTuning / Leads / Involved Parties.

Additionally, there is no option in Scoping to create Leads without an existing Account/Company, unlike with Opportunities.

What can we do to address this requirement?

entry.title: SAP Sales Service Cloud Version 2 API - Why no OData support?
entry.content:
Hello together,

someone knows the reason why v2 support only REST and not OData? SAP Cloud for customer (v1) uses OData Services. CAP is using OData and other SAP backend APIs are also OData Services. So I am just curious why REST was chosen or if OData will be supported later.

E.g.

v2 https://api.sap.com/api/SalesSvcCloudV2_taskService/overview 

v1 https://api.sap.com/api/activity/overview 

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: How to add survey link to email template in SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

My query is on Feedback flow feature in SAP Service Cloud V2.

In C4C V1, we have a possibility to link the placeholder to any unique id.

Example: #SURVEY145# linked to Ticket ID.

Similarly in V2, how to add a survey link to email template, so that when a feedback flow is triggers an email to customer where the customer can clicks on survey link and fill the survey.

Thanks,
Manson J

entry.title: As a partner, how do we know when to offer v2 over v1?
entry.content:
Hi experts

As an SAP partner, our team is doing some work in understanding how or when to position C4C v2 over v1 to new clients, or when to offer v2 to existing v1 clients. Can you point me to some documents or links which can help us out?

Thanks

entry.title: Resolving Mapping Issues Between SAP Customer Data Platform and SAP Service Cloud V1
entry.content:
Hello together,

We are currently working on an integration between the SAP Customer Data Platform (CDP) and a SAP Service Cloud V1 tenant. On the CDP side, we are using the Customer Schema "SAP Integrated," which includes arrays for address data. Specifically, we have three array

  • addresses (for postal address information)
  • phones
  • mails

However, on the Service Cloud side, we are utilizing the standard data model of the individual customer object. Here, the underlying navigation property for address entries consolidates all information into a single entry, encompassing address, phone, and mail data.

When attempting bi-directional mapping between these systems, we encounter a significant challenge. We need to map the arrays from the CDP to a single entry in the Service Cloud (C4C) environment. Conversely, one address entry in the C4C environment results in three separate entries in each array within the CDP. This leads to a problem where updating any customer information could generate multiple entries in the C4C, which originally had only one entry.

Example

  • CDP to C4C: The three separate arrays (addresses, phones, mails) in the CDP need to be merged into one entry in C4C.
  • C4C to CDP: A single entry in C4C generates three entries in the CDP arrays. If we update these, the customer record in C4C could mistakenly get multiple entries.

We would like to stay as close to the standard configuration as possible, avoiding custom development if possible.

Does anyone have experience with this kind of integration or suggestions on how to effectively map these data structures while staying close to standard configurations?

Best regards,

entry.title: BOs get locked by custom Action in OWL
entry.content:
We have the requirement to have a button that get a sum of the total net amount for selected customerQuotes / salesOrders in the OWL.

We implemented a custom absl BO Action in mass mode that calculates the sum and displays it in an information message. This is working prefectly fine.

The problem is, that the BOs we selected for which the action is called are getting locked in this process. As long as the user stays on the OWL the orders remain locked by the system. Because this is a mass operation we cannot accept that the orders get locked, so others cannot change them. We just need a simple "read only" action. But I cannot find any solution for this. I had the idea to use an Action Validation, but this is not available for my custom Action.

Does anybody have an idea?

entry.title: Can we update activity from Service request?
entry.content:
We have created an OVS field as Email assigned to and we want to update this field when there is an email going from Ticket and create an Activity. We want to update this field with the same employee who is assigned to the ticket.. Long story short we want to copy the ticket assigned to the email assigned to field on every inbound and outbound email interaction happens in the ticket.

 

I am using internal communication in the ticket but it seems it is not updating the acivity.

Please help..

Regards,

CXM

entry.title: Integration between sap service cloud version 2 with sap customer data cloud
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

Does anybody know about integration between SAP service cloud version 2 with SAP customer data cloud?
